en.text: a primitive root; (compare H2603); (compare H1288) properly, perhaps to bow (the neck only in courtesy to an equal), i.e. to be kind; also (by euphemistically, but rarely) to reprove

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; (compare H2603); (compare H1288) properly, perhaps to bow (the neck only in courtesy to an equal), i.e. to be kind; also (by euphemistically, but rarely) to reprove
